description: The equipment class (barbell vs dumbbell vs machine, etc.) that distinguishes a movement from its sibling variations (variation facet, §6.3) — not the concrete unit/make/model/settings, which is a Descriptors field (§5.16). Open token; unknown values round-trip (§3.3, §5.9). Equipment terms are domain-general (mobility/rehab/conditioning use the same classes as strength work), so this is a single shared vocabulary rather than a discipline-specific one. Seeded from the 19 values already in use across data/exercises.json, plus five common classes not yet in the registry (ez-bar, trap-bar, smith-machine, resistance-band, suspension).

tokens.label: Barbell
tokens.description: Straight barbell (e.g. back squat, bench press, deadlift).

tokens.label: Dumbbell
tokens.description: Dumbbell(s), used bilaterally or unilaterally.

tokens.label: Kettlebell
tokens.description: Kettlebell(s).

tokens.label: Cable
tokens.description: Cable stack/pulley machine.

tokens.label: Machine
tokens.description: Selectorized or plate-loaded machine (leg press, lat pulldown, etc.), other than cable, Smith, or suspension.

tokens.label: Bodyweight
tokens.description: No external load beyond the practitioner's own body weight.

tokens.label: None
tokens.description: No equipment involved (distinct from bodyweight where body weight is the load, e.g. stretching).

tokens.label: Box
tokens.description: Plyometric or step box.

tokens.label: Medicine Ball
tokens.description: Weighted medicine ball.

tokens.label: Sandbag
tokens.description: Sandbag, used for carries, cleans, or loaded work.

tokens.label: Sled
tokens.description: Weighted push/pull sled.

tokens.label: Yoke
tokens.description: Loaded frame carried on the shoulders/back (strongman yoke walk).

tokens.label: Stone
tokens.description: Atlas/loading stone (strongman).

tokens.label: Mace
tokens.description: Steel mace, swung for rotational/leverage training.

tokens.label: Caber
tokens.description: Tapered log tossed for distance/rotation (Highland games).

tokens.label: Implement
tokens.description: General/unspecified strongman or specialty implement not covered by a more specific token.

tokens.label: Heavy Bag
tokens.description: Suspended heavy/punching bag (striking conditioning).

tokens.label: Jump Rope
tokens.description: Jump rope/skipping rope.

tokens.label: Bicycle
tokens.description: Stationary or road bicycle (cycling conditioning).

tokens.label: EZ Bar
tokens.description: Cambered curl bar with angled grips.

tokens.label: Trap Bar
tokens.description: Hexagonal/trap bar with neutral, centered grip handles.

tokens.label: Smith Machine
tokens.description: Barbell fixed to a vertical linear track.

tokens.label: Resistance Band
tokens.description: Elastic resistance band, used standalone or as an accommodating-resistance accessory.

tokens.label: Suspension Trainer
tokens.description: Strap-based suspension trainer anchored overhead (e.g. TRX).

tokens.label: Hangboard
tokens.description: Fingerboard/hangboard with edges and pockets for climbing finger-strength hangs.

tokens.label: Campus Board
tokens.description: Overhanging board of wooden rungs for dynamic climbing power work (no feet).

tokens.label: Training Board
tokens.description: Standardized climbing training board (system/board-style wall with set hold layouts).

tokens.label: Pole
tokens.description: Vertical pole or stall bars gripped for leverage holds (human flag, pole work).

tokens.label: Kickboard
tokens.description: Foam swim kickboard held in the hands to isolate the kick.

tokens.label: Pull Buoy
tokens.description: Foam buoy held between the thighs to float the legs and isolate the swim pull.

tokens.label: Kayak
tokens.description: Kayak paddled with a double-bladed paddle.

tokens.label: Canoe
tokens.description: Canoe paddled with a single-bladed paddle.

tokens.label: Paddleboard
tokens.description: Stand-up paddleboard.

tokens.label: Surfboard
tokens.description: Surfboard (prone paddling, pop-up practice).

tokens.label: Rowing Shell
tokens.description: On-water rowing shell (sweep or sculling boat).

tokens.label: Rucksack
tokens.description: Loaded backpack/rucksack or plate carrier worn during locomotion (rucking).

tokens.label: Treadmill
tokens.description: Motorized or manual treadmill.

tokens.label: Snowshoes
tokens.description: Snowshoes for over-snow locomotion.

tokens.label: Poles
tokens.description: Walking/trekking or Nordic walking poles.

tokens.label: Skis
tokens.description: Skis (cross-country/backcountry ski locomotion).
